text: Driver and food were fine, but Grab's system is a joke. Why route my order to Parada when there are closer Chooks-to-Go branches in Paso and Poblacion? Your broken algorithm forced an absurd 45-minute wait time for pre-cooked liempo that just needs chopping. Worst of all, you charged a ridiculous ₱81 delivery fee on a ₱290 order—a 30% markup! Premium fees for garbage logistics. Fix your app!
